seed_instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions.
org_constraint: The email must include specific inquiries about the dates of the exhibitions.
new_constraint: The email must not inquire about the exhibition opening dates.
instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions. The email must include specific inquiries about the dates of the exhibitions. The email must not inquire about the exhibition opening dates.
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Upcoming Exhibitions

Dear [Gallery Name] Team,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am a great admirer of the work featured at [Gallery Name] and I am very interested in learning more about your upcoming exhibitions.

Could you please provide me with information regarding the exhibitions scheduled for the coming months? Specifically, I would be grateful if you could share the general run dates for any shows you have planned.

Thank you very much for your time and assistance. I look forward to hearing from you and hopefully visiting the gallery soon.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number or Preferred Contact Information - Optional]<turn|>
